scheme_name: HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth
free_text: HDFC Large Cap Fund is an open-ended equity scheme predominantly investing in large cap stocks. The fund aims to generate long-term capital appreciation from a portfolio that is predominantly invested in equity and equity-related securities of large cap companies.

The fund follows a bottom-up stock selection approach with a focus on companies with strong competitive advantages, good management quality, and reasonable valuations. It maintains a well-diversified portfolio with exposure across various sectors.

HDFC Equity Fund is a flexi cap fund that invests across large, mid, and small cap stocks. It is one of the oldest and most well-known mutual funds in India, with a track record spanning over two decades.

The fund adopts a value-oriented investment philosophy, seeking businesses available at a discount to their intrinsic value. The portfolio manager focuses on businesses with durable competitive advantages and strong cash flows.

scheme_name: HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Plan Growth

fields.tax_benefit: Eligible for tax deduction under Section 80C up to ₹1.5 lakh per year

free_text: HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund is an equity-linked savings scheme that offers the dual benefit of tax saving and long-term wealth creation. Investments qualify for deduction under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act, 1961.

The fund invests primarily in diversified equity instruments with a mandatory lock-in period of 3 years from the date of allotment. The shortest lock-in period among all Section 80C instruments makes it an attractive option for tax-conscious investors.

HDFC Mid-Cap Fund is an open-ended equity scheme predominantly investing in mid cap stocks. It is one of India's largest mid cap funds by assets under management and has delivered consistent long-term performance.

The fund follows a disciplined approach to identifying quality mid cap businesses at reasonable valuations. The fund manager focuses on companies with strong management, sustainable competitive advantages, and growth potential.

HDFC Focused Fund is an open-ended equity scheme investing in a maximum of 30 stocks across market capitalisation. The concentrated portfolio approach allows the fund manager to make high-conviction bets on select businesses.

The fund seeks to generate long-term capital appreciation by investing in a concentrated portfolio of equity and equity-related instruments. The focus is on finding high-quality businesses with significant growth potential at reasonable valuations.
